nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: Visible safeguarding pathway
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Safeguarding must be easy to find from the main navigation, contact routes, and any page where a young person or carer may need reassurance.

nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: Privacy clarity at every enquiry point
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Forms and contact routes must explain what information is used for and link to the production privacy notice.

nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: Secure server-side enquiry handling
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Launch-critical enquiries cannot depend on a visitor having a local email app configured.

nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: No invented operational facts
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Unknown facts such as phone number, named safeguarding lead, venue address policy, and access criteria must stay explicit placeholders until confirmed.

nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: AI illustration disclosure
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Illustration-led contexts must disclose that images are AI-generated and not participant photography.

nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.title: Accessible core journeys
nonNegotiableTrustRequirements.description: Join-session, support enquiry, and safeguarding journeys must be readable, keyboard-friendly, and low-friction on mobile.

launchBlockers.summary: Public phone number is missing from the source materials.
A named safeguarding contact or confirmed alternate route has not been supplied.
The production privacy notice is now seeded, but any future analytics, cookies, processors, or retention-schedule changes must update the canonical privacy content before release.
The source materials do not confirm whether sessions are free, open access, or referral-based.

phaseTwoBacklog.title: Consented real-photo gallery
phaseTwoBacklog.reasonDeferred: The brief explicitly says photography will be provided later; launch should not imply real participant imagery exists yet.

phaseTwoBacklog.title: Impact and stories section
phaseTwoBacklog.reasonDeferred: The organisation needs real stories, permissions, and proof content before publishing an impact-led section.

phaseTwoBacklog.title: Team page with approved bios and headshots
phaseTwoBacklog.reasonDeferred: The current brief does not include approved headshots or biography content.

phaseTwoBacklog.title: Approved partner logos, funder marks, and collaboration proof
phaseTwoBacklog.reasonDeferred: The current source set does not include approved partner or funder assets, case studies, or permission-cleared proof items for public use.
